allow: PowerShell(php artisan make:migration add_cached_metrics_to_recipe_drafts --no-interaction; php artisan make:command RecacheDraftMetrics --no-interaction)
PowerShell(vendor/bin/pint --dirty --format agent 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; php artisan migrate --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)

PowerShell(vendor/bin/pint --dirty --format agent 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; php artisan test --compact tests/Feature/Recipes/Metrics/DraftCardMetricsTest.php tests/Feature/Recipes/Metrics/DraftMetricsTest.php tests/Feature/Recipes/RecipeSearchTest.php tests/Feature/Recipes/RecipeDraftTest.php 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
PowerShell(php artisan test --compact tests/Feature/Recipes tests/Feature/Library 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
